name: Private Patch Reef Fishing
pricingExcerpt: Pricing 4 Hours – $1,395 6 Hours – $1,595 8 Hours – $1,795 Private Charter – Flexible departure times About Patch Reef Fishing in Key West is tailor-made for the weekend angler seeking quality fishing without the intensity of offshore sportfishing. We target productive patch reefs located just a few miles offshore — shallow enough for comfort, deep enough to hold a wide variety of reef species. You’ll drop fish directly over live reef structure targeting snapper, grouper, porgies, hogfish (season permitting), yellowtail, mangrove snapper, and other prized bottom dwellers.
